TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna Ś•≥ŚźĆśÄßśąÄŤÄÖ tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna "kamu nu Ing, Lesbian" u nu tataynaay, u nizateng tu manamuh tu malecaday tu u tatayna a maydih malaacawa, namahini makai' tu tatama malacabay anucaay u malecaday ku kakaydihan angangan u mahiniay ku waway a tatayna. tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna amin u "lye-s-pyen' apangangan, lye-s-pyen mala u ngangan, mapatuzu' u mapatatenga'ay izaw ku tatayna a tung-sin-lyenay hananay. nilaculan layak a cudad šł≠śĖá kasumamadan, pangangan tu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna u "mimulic tu ba'tu, mimulic tu dadingu, mimulic tu dadingu. u mimulicay tu dadingu, u dadingu nu sumamaday, kidisen kya takelal taneng a dadinguen. u wayway nu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna pangangan han tu mahiniay, mimulicay tu taw-hu, anucaay mimulic tu dadingu han "tribadism" mahiniay ku imi. ŚŹ§śôā, , u wayway nu tatusaay a tatayna masakikis anaay maaikec tu uzip kuheni katukuh kaedeman, uyzasa malecaday tu ku uzip, mahizaay i teban sinipazeng tu dading amamulic, pangangan han "mimulic tu dading" han. nipangangan nu sumamaday tu "masasukaen" han. zayhan mahiniay a kawaw tung-sin-lyenay a tatayana hananay a kawaw i zikuzanay muenengay a acawa nu hungti, pisalisinan a luma', puenengan kakabian nu tatayna caay kadayum masuninip nu i hekalay, saca kasumamadanay a ziday masapuenel i bungkay ku tatayna, iayaway a likisi u tatama ku situngusasa inayi' ku nikiluan tu nu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna, caay kakatuud ku matinengay. ayzaay a ziday u nisulit a pangangan makayzaay i Ow-cow tung-sin-lyen a tatayna nipangangan "angangan nu Amilika a sulit", izaw ku itizaay a tademaw uzip ku misanga'ay anucaay sinidimut tu mahuiniay a kamu. Cung-kuw-Talu šł≠ŚúčŚ§ßťôł Cung-kuw-Talu, tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna mapangangan tu pay-he singangan aca tu "lye-s-pyen" "kamu nu Ing" anca "lala" han angangan makay Taywanay "la-ce". i Taywan, sulit a cudan nu Ing "Lesbian" sa u nipibelinan a cudad nu Lyakay tu "la-ce" anucaay "tatayna kaput' han u maazihay a nipabelinan a kamu u "lye-s-pyen". "La-ce" sa u nu saayaway a nisanga'an nu misulitay tu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna ci Ciw-myaw-cin "e-yia" a nisulitan" a cudadan, zikuz mala tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna a sakaput i labu u nipangnan nu uzip. Syang-kang ť¶ôśłĮ Syang-kang, tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna pangangan han tu " Les" nu Ing-wen a ngangan "Lesbian" han. iayaw a nipatinaku tu wayway nu tung-sin-lyen a tatayna mimulicat tu tawhu, "tuw-bu-pow" "misapuenelay" patinakuay tu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna. "Les",śėĮŤčĪśĖá"Lesbian"ÁöĄÁį°Á®Ī. . uyza satu, nipangangan nu tademaw amin tu "TB" "Tomboy" masatatamaay a tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna, "TBG" "TomBoy Girl" u kanamuhan nu tataynaay "TB" sa u tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna. ś≠§Ś§Ė,šļļŚÄĎšĽ•"TB" "TBG" "TB"ÁöĄŚ•≥ŚźĆśÄßśąÄŤÄÖ. i 90 a mihcaan malingatu tahkal ku "Pure" hanay a akamu, misengi "caay kasazuma" tu nu Taywanay, manamuh tu tatayna "anu u TB anca u TBG" a tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna, pahuyayan ku kasizikec, u waway, u nizateng. i 2004 a mihcaan, patinaku tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna nu Amilika nisaigian tu "The L Word" manamuh miazzih ku tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna, malingatu musakamu tu mahiniay hinisa "Pure" a kamu mituzu'ay tu manamuhay tu tataynaaytu a tatayna nu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna. 90ŚĻīšĽ£,ťĖčŚßčŚáļÁŹĺ"Pure" TBśąĖTBG) "The L Word" "Pure" . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna ***** tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna "kamu nu iŇč, r~…ĺ…ôsbian" u nu tatajnaaj, u nizat…ôŇč tu manamuńß tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu u tatajna a majdińß mar~…ĺaa ¶awa, namańßini makai Ē~ ° tu tatama mar~…ĺa ¶abaj anu ¶aaj u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku kakajdińßan aŇčaŇčan u mańßiniaj ku wawaj a tatajna. tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna amin u "r~…ĺj…ô-s-pj…ôn Ē~ ° apaŇčaŇčan, r~…ĺj…ô-s-pj…ôn mar~…ĺa u ŇčaŇčan, mapatuzu Ē~ ° u mapatat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj izaw ku tatajna a tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj ńßananaj. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan r~…ĺajak a ¶udad ** kasumamadan, paŇčaŇčan tu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna u "mimur~…ĺi ¶ tu ba Ē~ °tu, mimur~…ĺi ¶ tu dadiŇču, mimur~…ĺi ¶ tu dadiŇču. u mimur~…ĺi ¶aj tu dadiŇču, u dadiŇču nu sumamadaj, kidis…ôn kja tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tan…ôŇč a dadiŇču…ôn. u wajwaj nu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu mańßiniaj, mimur~…ĺi ¶aj tu taw-ńßu, anu ¶aaj mimur~…ĺi ¶ tu dadiŇču ńßan "tribadism" mańßiniaj ku imi. **, , u wajwaj nu tatusaaj a tatajna masakikis anaaj maaik…ô ¶ tu uzip kuńß…ôni katukuńß ka…ôd…ôman, ujzasa mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu ku uzip, mańßizaaj i t…ôban sinipaz…ôŇč tu dadiŇč amamur~…ĺi ¶, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "mimur~…ĺi ¶ tu dadiŇč" ńßan. nipaŇčaŇčan nu sumamadaj tu "masasuka…ôn" ńßan. zajńßan mańßiniaj a kawaw tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajana ńßananaj a kawaw i zikuzanaj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a a ¶awa nu ńßuŇčti, pisar~…ĺisinan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, pu…ôn…ôŇčan kakabian nu tatajna ¶aaj kadajum masuninip nu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj, sa ¶a kasumamadanaj a zidaj masapu…ôn…ôr~…ĺ i buŇčkaj ku tatajna, iajawaj a r~…ĺikisi u tatama ku situŇčusasa inaji Ē~ ° ku nikir~…ĺuan tu nu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna, ¶aaj kakatuud ku matin…ôŇčaj. ajzaaj a zidaj u nisur~…ĺit a paŇčaŇčan makajzaaj i ow- ¶ow tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ôn a tatajna nipaŇčaŇčan "aŇčaŇčan nu amir~…ĺika a sur~…ĺit", izaw ku itizaaj a tad…ômaw uzip ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj anu ¶aaj sinidimut tu mańßuiniaj a kamu. ¶uŇč-kuw-tar~…ĺu **** ¶uŇč-kuw-tar~…ĺu, tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna mapaŇčaŇčan tu paj-ńß…ô siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu "r~…ĺj…ô-s-pj…ôn" "kamu nu iŇč" an ¶a "r~…ĺar~…ĺa" ńßan aŇčaŇčan makaj tajwanaj "r~…ĺa- ¶…ô". i tajwan, sur~…ĺit a ¶udan nu iŇč "r~…ĺ…ôsbian" sa u nipib…ôr~…ĺinan a ¶udad nu r~…ĺjakaj tu "r~…ĺa- ¶…ô" anu ¶aaj "tatajna kaput Ē~ ° ńßan u maazińßaj a nipab…ôr~…ĺinan a kamu u "r~…ĺj…ô-s-pj…ôn". "r~…ĺa- ¶…ô" sa u nu saajawaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu misur~…ĺitaj tu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna ¶i ¶iw-mjaw- ¶in "…ô-jia" a nisur~…ĺitan" a ¶udadan, zikuz mar~…ĺa tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna a sakaput i r~…ĺabu u nipaŇčnan nu uzip. sjaŇč-kaŇč ** sjaŇč-kaŇč, tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " r~…ĺ…ôs" nu iŇč-w…ôn a ŇčaŇčan "r~…ĺ…ôsbian" ńßan. iajaw a nipatinaku tu wajwaj nu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ôn a tatajna mimur~…ĺi ¶at tu tawńßu, "tuw-bu-pow" "misapu…ôn…ôr~…ĺaj" patinakuaj tu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna. "r~…ĺ…ôs",***"r~…ĺ…ôsbian"***. . ujza satu, nipaŇčaŇčan nu tad…ômaw amin tu "tb" "tomboj" masatatamaaj a tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna, "tbg" "tomboj girr~…ĺ" u kanamuńßan nu tatajnaaj "tb" sa u tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna. **,***"tb" "tbg" "tb"******. i ** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu tańßkar~…ĺ ku "pur…ô" ńßanaj a akamu, mis…ôŇči " ¶aaj kasazuma" tu nu tajwanaj, manamuńß tu tatajna "anu u tb an ¶a u tbg" a tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna, pańßujajan ku kasizik…ô ¶, u wawaj, u nizat…ôŇč. i **** a mińß ¶aan, patinaku tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna nu amir~…ĺika nisaigian tu "tńß…ô r~…ĺ word" manamuńß miazzińß ku tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna, mar~…ĺiŇčatu musakamu tu mańßiniaj ńßinisa "pur…ô" a kamu mituzu Ē~ °aj tu manamuńßaj tu tatajnaajtu a tatajna nu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna. ****,****"pur…ô" tb*tbg) "tńß…ô r~…ĺ word" "pur…ô" . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna Ś•≥ŚźĆśÄßśąÄŤÄÖ tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna "kamu nu Ing, Lesbian" u nu tataynaay, u nizateng tu manamuh tu malecaday tu u tatayna a maydih malaacawa, namahini makai' tu tatama malacabay anucaay u malecaday ku kakaydihan angangan u mahiniay ku waway a tatayna. tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna amin u "lye-s-pyen' apangangan, lye-s-pyen mala u ngangan, mapatuzu' u mapatatenga'ay izaw ku tatayna a tung-sin-lyenay hananay. nilaculan layak a cudad šł≠śĖá kasumamadan, pangangan tu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna u "mimulic tu ba'tu, mimulic tu dadingu, mimulic tu dadingu. u mimulicay tu dadingu, u dadingu nu sumamaday, kidisen kya takelal taneng a dadinguen. u wayway nu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna pangangan han tu mahiniay, mimulicay tu taw-hu, anucaay mimulic tu dadingu han "tribadism" mahiniay ku imi. ŚŹ§śôā, , u wayway nu tatusaay a tatayna masakikis anaay maaikec tu uzip kuheni katukuh kaedeman, uyzasa malecaday tu ku uzip, mahizaay i teban sinipazeng tu dading amamulic, pangangan han "mimulic tu dading" han. nipangangan nu sumamaday tu "masasukaen" han. zayhan mahiniay a kawaw tung-sin-lyenay a tatayana hananay a kawaw i zikuzanay muenengay a acawa nu hungti, pisalisinan a luma', puenengan kakabian nu tatayna caay kadayum masuninip nu i hekalay, saca kasumamadanay a ziday masapuenel i bungkay ku tatayna, iayaway a likisi u tatama ku situngusasa inayi' ku nikiluan tu nu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna, caay kakatuud ku matinengay. ayzaay a ziday u nisulit a pangangan makayzaay i Ow-cow tung-sin-lyen a tatayna nipangangan "angangan nu Amilika a sulit", izaw ku itizaay a tademaw uzip ku misanga'ay anucaay sinidimut tu mahuiniay a kamu. Cung-kuw-Talu šł≠ŚúčŚ§ßťôł Cung-kuw-Talu, tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna mapangangan tu pay-he singangan aca tu "lye-s-pyen" "kamu nu Ing" anca "lala" han angangan makay Taywanay "la-ce". i Taywan, sulit a cudan nu Ing "Lesbian" sa u nipibelinan a cudad nu Lyakay tu "la-ce" anucaay "tatayna kaput' han u maazihay a nipabelinan a kamu u "lye-s-pyen". "La-ce" sa u nu saayaway a nisanga'an nu misulitay tu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna ci Ciw-myaw-cin "e-yia" a nisulitan" a cudadan, zikuz mala tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna a sakaput i labu u nipangnan nu uzip. Syang-kang ť¶ôśłĮ Syang-kang, tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna pangangan han tu " Les" nu Ing-wen a ngangan "Lesbian" han. iayaw a nipatinaku tu wayway nu tung-sin-lyen a tatayna mimulicat tu tawhu, "tuw-bu-pow" "misapuenelay" patinakuay tu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna. "Les",śėĮŤčĪśĖá"Lesbian"ÁöĄÁį°Á®Ī. . uyza satu, nipangangan nu tademaw amin tu "TB" "Tomboy" masatatamaay a tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna, "TBG" "TomBoy Girl" u kanamuhan nu tataynaay "TB" sa u tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna. ś≠§Ś§Ė,šļļŚÄĎšĽ•"TB" "TBG" "TB"ÁöĄŚ•≥ŚźĆśÄßśąÄŤÄÖ. i 90 a mihcaan malingatu tahkal ku "Pure" hanay a akamu, misengi "caay kasazuma" tu nu Taywanay, manamuh tu tatayna "anu u TB anca u TBG" a tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna, pahuyayan ku kasizikec, u waway, u nizateng. i 2004 a mihcaan, patinaku tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna nu Amilika nisaigian tu "The L Word" manamuh miazzih ku tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna, malingatu musakamu tu mahiniay hinisa "Pure" a kamu mituzu'ay tu manamuhay tu tataynaaytu a tatayna nu tung-sin-lyenay a tatayna. 90ŚĻīšĽ£,ťĖčŚßčŚáļÁŹĺ"Pure" TBśąĖTBG) "The L Word" "Pure" . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

mar~…ĺaa ¶awa, namańßini makai Ē~ ° tu tatama mar~…ĺa ¶abaj anu ¶aaj u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku kakajdińßan aŇčaŇčan u mańßiniaj ku wawaj a tatajna. tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna amin u "r~…ĺj…ô-s-pj…ôn Ē~ ° apaŇčaŇčan, r~…ĺj…ô-s-pj…ôn mar~…ĺa u ŇčaŇčan, mapatuzu Ē~ ° u mapatat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj izaw ku tatajna a tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj ńßananaj. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan r~…ĺajak a ¶udad ** kasumamadan, paŇčaŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, pu…ôn…ôŇčan kakabian nu tatajna ¶aaj kadajum masuninip nu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj, sa ¶a kasumamadanaj a zidaj masapu…ôn…ôr~…ĺ i buŇčkaj ku tatajna, iajawaj a r~…ĺikisi u tatama ku situŇčusasa inaji Ē~ ° ku nikir~…ĺuan tu nu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna, ¶aaj kakatuud ku matin…ôŇčaj. ajzaaj a zidaj u nisur~…ĺit a paŇčaŇčan makajzaaj i ow- ¶ow tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ôn a tatajna nipaŇčaŇčan "aŇčaŇčan nu amir~…ĺika a sur~…ĺit", izaw ku itizaaj a tad…ômaw uzip ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj anu ¶aaj sinidimut tu mańßuiniaj a kamu. ¶uŇč-kuw-tar~…ĺu **** ¶uŇč-kuw-tar~…ĺu, tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna mapaŇčaŇčan tu paj-ńß…ô siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu "r~…ĺj…ô-s-pj…ôn" "kamu nu iŇč" an ¶a "r~…ĺar~…ĺa" ńßan aŇčaŇčan makaj tajwanaj "r~…ĺa- ¶…ô". i tajwan, sur~…ĺit a ¶udan nu iŇč "r~…ĺ…ôsbian" sa u nipib…ôr~…ĺinan a ¶udad nu r~…ĺjakaj tu "r~…ĺa- ¶…ô" anu ¶aaj "tatajna kaput Ē~ ° ńßan u maazińßaj a nipab…ôr~…ĺinan a kamu u "r~…ĺj…ô-s-pj…ôn". "r~…ĺa- ¶…ô" sa u nu saajawaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu misur~…ĺitaj tu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna ¶i ¶iw-mjaw- ¶in "…ô-jia" a nisur~…ĺitan" a ¶udadan, zikuz mar~…ĺa tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna a sakaput i r~…ĺabu u nipaŇčnan nu uzip. sjaŇč-kaŇč ** sjaŇč-kaŇč, tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " r~…ĺ…ôs" nu iŇč-w…ôn a ŇčaŇčan "r~…ĺ…ôsbian" ńßan. iajaw a nipatinaku tu wajwaj nu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ôn a tatajna mimur~…ĺi ¶at tu tawńßu, "tuw-bu-pow" "misapu…ôn…ôr~…ĺaj" patinakuaj tu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna. "r~…ĺ…ôs",***"r~…ĺ…ôsbian"***. . ujza satu, nipaŇčaŇčan nu tad…ômaw amin tu "tb" "tomboj" masatatamaaj a tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna, "tbg" "tomboj girr~…ĺ" u kanamuńßan nu tatajnaaj "tb" sa u tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna. **,***"tb" "tbg" "tb"******. i ** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu tańßkar~…ĺ ku "pur…ô" ńßanaj a akamu, mis…ôŇči " ¶aaj kasazuma" tu nu tajwanaj, manamuńß tu tatajna "anu u tb an ¶a u tbg" a tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna, pańßujajan ku kasizik…ô ¶, u wawaj, u nizat…ôŇč. i **** a mińß ¶aan, patinaku tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna nu amir~…ĺika nisaigian tu "tńß…ô r~…ĺ word" manamuńß miazzińß ku tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna, mar~…ĺiŇčatu musakamu tu mańßiniaj ńßinisa "pur…ô" a kamu mituzu Ē~ °aj tu manamuńßaj tu tatajnaajtu a tatajna nu tuŇč-sin-r~…ĺj…ônaj a tatajna. ****,****"pur…ô" tb*tbg) "tńß…ô r~…ĺ word" "pur…ô" . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
